name: Manual Control
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Our Merchant.JS (MJS) library exposes a simple API that you can use to manage widgets, listen for and trigger different events, or utilize external analytics - thus further customizing the look and feel of the Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) integration. The MJS iterates over "},{"text":"window.findifyCallbacks","code":true},{"text":" array and injects the "},{"text":"findify","code":true},{"text":" object there. You can also access "},{"text":"window.findify","code":true},{"text":" when MJS is fully loaded."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"📘 To wait until Merchandising Cloud is loaded push your callbacks into "},{"text":"window.findifyCallbacks","code":true},{"text":" array.
"}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"JavaScript
window.findifyCallbacks = [  (findify) => { ...your code here }]"}]}],"appearance":"neutral"},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Element"}]}]},{"type":"th","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Description"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"findify.analytics"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The @findify /analytics instance. It allows for the triggering of events from outside components and listens for them."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"findify.config"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The immutable configuration of your store. Use "},{"text":"findify.config.toJS()","code":true},{"text":" to see it as a normal Javascript object."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"findify.emit"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Emit "},{"type":"a","url":"https://github.com/findify/findify-js/blob/develop/packages/bundle/src/core/events.ts","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"system events"}]},{"text":", such as 'show mobile facets'."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"findify.listen"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Listen for system events."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"findify.invalidate"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Invalidates modules cache["},{"text":"only for Devtools","italic":true},{"text":"]."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"findify.widgets"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The collection of methods to create/modify already injected widgets. Read more below."}]}]}]}],"id":"table-1-3","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Manage Widgets"}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Attach new widget"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"window.findify.widgets.attach(selector, type, config)","code":true}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"th","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"selector"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"CSS selector or DOM node where you attach the widget."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"type"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The type of widget - "},{"text":"autocomplete","code":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"recommendation","code":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"search","code":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"smart-collection","code":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"config"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The configuration which will extend the default configuration for this type of widget eq:"},{"text":"{ appendTo: 'body', key: 'test' }","code":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]}],"id":"table-0-7","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Remove Existing Widget"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"window.findify.widgets.detach(key)","code":true},{"text":"
The "},{"text":"key","code":true},{"text":" is the unique name of the widget. You can provide it in HTML element by adding "},{"text":"data-findify-key="test"","code":true},{"text":" or in config when attaching feature."}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Get Widgets by Key"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"window.findify.widgets.get(key)","code":true},{"text":"
You can get a widget by its key. If it was not provided, the increment number will be used."}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Find Widgets by Type"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"window.findify.widgets.findByType(type)","code":true},{"text":"
Find all widgets with given type."}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Get List of Widgets"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"window.findify.list()","code":true},{"text":"
This function will return an array of widgets on the page, so you can access their agents and send a request."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"JavaScript"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"window.findify.widgets  .list()  .find(widget => widget.type === 'autocomplete').agent  .set('q', 'test query')  .on('suggestions', (list) => {console.log(list)})","code":true}]}],"lang":"dart"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
